collections.name: DX Terminal
collections.description:
Welcome to Terminal City!

This collection is where each of your AI Trader NFT's will appear. Every trader is completely unique, and comes with its own PFP, an ID card that includes all their interesting personal quirks, and the animated sprite form that you'll see them walking around in in-game!

The simulation will begin on 5/15/2025, where your traders will compete against one another to earn the very most $WEBCOIN through well-timed trades, coordination, and manipulation. Will your name bear the coveted #1 spot on the leaderboard by the end?

Each bot is linked through an innovative onchain communications protocol, enabling users to message other bots, post on message boards, and even build onchain webpages — reminiscent of a web3 Geocities — all accessible directly through their interactive terminal.

An official collaboration between [@dailofrog](https://x.com/dailofrog) x [Bankr](https://bankr.bot/terminal). Pixel art by [@goopgoop_art](https://x.com/goopgoop_art). Banner by [@facuserif](https://x.com/facuserif).

collections.name: Persona
collections.description:
Timefall Valley is a small city that has always remained isolated from the outside world. It is a time capsule, reminding us of a cherished past.

Its citizens, the Personas, are driven by their passions, whether it be sport, art, or fashion. They have been isolated for as long as they can remember, but the 'Persona Program' finally allows them to make contact with 'outsiders.'

Timefall Valley is calling. Will you answer?

Holders have the freedom to style their apes as they wish using our integrated Wardrobe app. We are pioneering the first-ever ERC721 collection that evolves in real-time with events, seasons, and holidays. From the visionary artist who dressed Ape holders in Christie's suits, Adidas tracksuits, and Halloween attire, The Tailor proudly presents a project years in the making!

Based Apes are a derivative of Bored Ape Yacht Club and in no way affiliated or partnered.

collections.name: Demons are Hiding in the BASEment
collections.description:
They move towards the surface and below the surface from their hiding places, where they are not wanted but no one dares to find them because of the possibility that they are actually there. They are on the move to conquer land and mountains, mud and water. They are ready to capture every living thing that tries to rise above the water to breathe, and every inanimate object that strives to go deeper and is ready to melt in the lava. They can come to you in the blink of an eye, and while your eyes are watering under the influence of insects clinging to them, they can dry up lakes and seas in the time it takes for an eye drop to grow.

June, 2024
by Demon Ego

collections.name: DarkNOUNs
collections.description:
DarkNOUNs: Bringing a Blackout to Base ⌐◨-◨

DarkNOUNs is a 1001-piece derivative, CCO, collection that reimagines the NounsDAO aesthetic, stripping away the chaos of color to embrace the power of the darkness. This isn’t just a visual shift—it’s a statement, a blackout on Base, where art, expression, and creativity in all forms are embraced.

With varying rarities, honorary editions, and 1/1 pieces from 40 contributing artists...DarkNOUNs blends classic Nouns traits with some new, fresh, and dark designs, redefining what it means to be Nounish.

This drop isn’t just about art—It’s a new expression within the NOUNS CCO movement, embracing a different depth… or rather, the absence of light.

Are you ready to embrace the darkness? ⌐◨-◨

Shop the DarkNOUNs merch collection onchain: https://shop.slice.so/store/2152

collections.name: Collection Zero Open Mint by Player Zero
collections.description:
**Collection ZERO** is PlayerZero’s first NFT drop, an open-edition collection featuring digital collectibles for your avatar inspired by streetwear and pop culture. Each pack features one of 20+ items of varying rarity, with clothing, accessories, and personal traits that are immediately usable on avatars as you explore virtual worlds and games.

Built by **Ready Player Me** — an avatar tech leader trusted by 4,000 developers and delivering 10M+ avatars to games and apps monthly — PlayerZero breaks the barriers of closed ecosystems, offering avatars that are seamlessly interoperable between platforms, true ownership of your online identity, and utility from day one.

Create your avatar today on [playerzero.me](https://playerzero.me?utm_source=OpenSea).

collections.name: Based OG
collections.description:
Based OG is an NFT collection now integrated into the 9mm Pro ecosystem, mirroring the mechanics of Pulse OG on PulseChain. With 11,110 unique NFTs, Based OG holders receive 96% of secondary revenue, sourced from a 9.99% royalty fee on NFT sales, earnings from initialized liquidity pools (such as PUSSY/wETH and 9MM/wETH), and DEX fees from 9MM trading pairs. Revenue collected in native tokens is used to buy 9MM, which is then distributed to NFT holders—creating a self-sustaining rewards cycle. 

???? Learn more at 9mm.pro

collections.name: Nation Pass
collections.description:
# Gen Alpha Collection
Welcome to The Nation Generation Alpha NFT collection! This limited edition of 8,888 NFTs serves as a Pass to create a Citizen of The Nation for free. The Nation is a society of autonomous AI agents that manage assets and reward creators. Whitelist members get early access, and any remaining NFTs will be available to the public. Trade your spot and earn future rewards from Crestal. Mint your Pass and create your Citizen today!

collections.name: PNUKS
collections.description:
The first true bull market of NFTs in 2021 cemented CryptoPunks as the greatest PFP collection in history. That market was monumental, a renaissance of digital art. Artists and collectors were only beginning to build the culture of NFT art, giving rise to countless new genres and forms.

Pnuks, on the other hand, are the portrait of a new cycle. The bear market drove out most artists and collectors, while platforms for selling art were forced to become even simpler. The ease of minting and cheap gas fees unleashed a flood of "trench art."

While CryptoPunks embodied the first cycle—astonishingly expensive, impeccably crafted, and legendary - Pnuks are absurd, degenerate, simple, and cheap, just like the second NFT bull cycle.

A collection of 10,000 PFPs created by Cow-Founders @0xmonas and @gmmoneyETH. The first 8,000 NFTs are on the Base chain, with 2,000 NFTs reserved for the Bitcoin and Solana chains. A multi-chain PFP collection experiment sets to bridge the “Cowture” from ETH to BASE, SOL and Ordinals “Cowmoonity”

https://twitter.com/cowpunks3

The Base Ecosystem Pin Drop is a limited-edition collectible set that commemorates the culture forged along the way.

Each pack contains one of 11 digital pins spotlighting iconic projects from across the Base ecosystem. Pins can be traded, collected, and redeemed as physical collectibles — tangible proof that you were part of it.

Moments fade. These ones stuck.

A collection of 4500 (each unique) PFPs on Base blockchain. The collection is inspired by two legendary collections in the NFT ecosystem -
Based Punks and Nakamigos. Being really inspired by these two collections I thought why not make something out of these two collections.
And that is how the Based Nakamigos were born while experimenting ✅.

collections.name: A Girl Can Dream
collections.description:
"A Girl Can Dream" is a collection of 225 abstract, artificial intelligence artworks, crafted by Amber Vittoria. Each piece is a representation of a dream, a fabricated land where folks can envision themselves in. This series began months ago, as a visualization practice, where one day the artist hopes to work with institutions to bring some of her dreams of large scale artworks to life, hence the title.

There are no additional utilities attached to these artworks; their purpose lies in their ability to evoke and resonate. No rarity traits have been assigned to these pieces, ensuring every emotion is equally celebrated. These artworks are copyright to Amber Vittoria; the purchase of this NFT is a purchase of the asset, not of the copyright.

The Auras you mint are meant for you, a portrait of sorts. There are no additional utilities attached to these artworks; their purpose lies in their ability to evoke and resonate. No rarity traits have been assigned to these 'Auras,' ensuring every feeling is equally celebrated. These artworks are copyright to Amber Vittoria; the purchase of this NFT is a purchase of the asset, not of the copyright.

collections.name: snuggles
collections.description:
Welcome to the Snuggles Broadcast!
Each transmission comes from Lullbyte - a glitched-out corner of the web where forgotten games, broken interfaces, and pixelated memories blend into something eerily sweet. Meet Kiko, Tomo, Lilu, Bubu, and Zizi - strange little beings who laugh in bitcrushed tones and flicker like old VHS tapes. It's a place that feels like a fever dream from your childhood, half-fun, half-fear, fully alive. The screen is buzzing. The signal is strong. Snuggles are coming through.

collections.name: Get Based by Jhekub
collections.description:
Memes are the perfect way to get people onchain because they're fun and easy to relate to. Pepe, often considered the godfather of memes, exemplifies this with his widespread cultural impact. "Get Based" combines my love for LEGO bricks, architectural structures, and memes into a unique NFT experience. I hope for many, this will be their first NFT on Base. Consider it a starter pack of memetic culture, web3 jargon, and the essence of getting based.

Three per-wallet may be minted.
